历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the science group were approximately 1788 → 2361 → 4131 → 2037 → 25587; from 2021 to 2024, mainstream rankings fluctuated between 1800 and 4100, but in 2025, due to a gap in the professional group (302) (minimum score 559/rank 25587), the overall ranking shifted significantly backward; the 2025 baseline takes the maximum ranking of approximately 25587; the provincial science group enrollment plan was 92 in 2021, 87 in 2022, 89 in 2023, 89 in 2024, and 92 in 2025; the 2026 physics category plan is 85, a decrease of 7 compared to 2025 (a reduction of about 7.6%), slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 8th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, consistently among the top ten nationally, with an extremely high school level; the reputation evaluation for the 2025 college entrance examination cycle was 'clearly negative' (12 incidents), involving campus safety, teacher ethics, etc.; the 2026 cycle remains 'somewhat negative' (99 incidents), with significant public opinion pressure; Douyin popularity ranking 19th (high heat), with high short video exposure; Surveying and Mapping Science and Technology A+, Geophysics A+, Marxist Theory A+, Law A+, Water Conservancy Engineering A, Biology A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Software Engineering A-, and strong performance in electronic information-related disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and automation, and other popular science majors are highly recommended with high social heat; in 2026, the number of physics category candidates in the province is 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly reducing competition; Wuhan University is located in Hubei, with a enrollment proportion in Shanxi Province of about 2%-5% (in 2025, 28 students were enrolled in Shanxi, accounting for about 4.7% of the total national enrollment), not a local university, with no significant regional preference advantage.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal baseline of a significant ranking shift backward due to the 2025 professional group gap, the 7.6% enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifying competition, the slight 3.4% decrease in provincial physics candidates partially offsetting the enrollment reduction, and the somewhat negative reputation potentially suppressing some application enthusiasm; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 24,219, with a range of 23,719 to 24,719.
